animation.init_zero: Initialization: Consider element at Index 0 as the sorted portion
animation.round_start: Round {{i}}: Store Index {{i}} ({{val}}) as insertVal, prepare to insert into the sorted portion
animation.compare_true: Compare: Is Index {{j}} ({{scanVal}}) greater than insertVal ({{keyVal}}) -> True
